title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Whirlpool India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
